title: NetworkSettings empty in API
body:
API:

curl -GET --unix-socket /tmp/podman.sock http://localhost/containers/ff5c7f534d3e/json | python -m json.tool

```json
"NetworkSettings": {
        "Bridge": "",
        "EndpointID": "",
        "Gateway": "",
        "GlobalIPv6Address": "",
        "GlobalIPv6PrefixLen": 0,
        "HairpinMode": false,
        "IPAddress": "",
        "IPPrefixLen": 0,
        "IPv6Gateway": "",
        "LinkLocalIPv6Address": "",
        "LinkLocalIPv6PrefixLen": 0,
        "MacAddress": "",
        "Networks": null,
        "Ports": {},
        "SandboxID": "",
        "SandboxKey": "",
        "SecondaryIPAddresses": null,
        "SecondaryIPv6Addresses": null
    },
```

podman inspect ff5c7f534d3e

```json
"NetworkSettings": {
            "EndpointID": "",
            "Gateway": "10.88.0.1",
            "IPAddress": "10.88.0.6",
            "IPPrefixLen": 16,
            "IPv6Gateway": "",
            "GlobalIPv6Address": "",
            "GlobalIPv6PrefixLen": 0,
            "MacAddress": "72:90:dd:e7:6f:65",
            "Bridge": "",
            "SandboxID": "",
            "HairpinMode": false,
            "LinkLocalIPv6Address": "",
            "LinkLocalIPv6PrefixLen": 0,
            "Ports": {},
            "SandboxKey": "/var/run/netns/cni-2f336357-1f65-6289-1d1f-2059f110bd78"
        }
```

comments.body:
```
podman version
Version:      2.1.1
API Version:  2.0.0
Go Version:   go1.14
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
This should be fixed on master.
